faction.dungeon.name: Dungeon
unit.t1-eclaireur.name: Scout
unit.t1-eclaireur-elite.name: Assassin
unit.t2-furie-sanglante.name: Blood Fury
unit.t2-furie-sanglante-elite.name: Unleashed Fury
unit.t3-minotaure.name: Minotaur
unit.t3-minotaure-elite.name: Minotaur Guard
unit.t4-chevaucheur-tenebres.name: Dark Raider
unit.t4-chevaucheur-tenebres-elite.name: Black Rider
unit.t5-sorciere-ombre.name: Shadow Witch
unit.t5-sorciere-ombre-elite.name: Shadow Matron
unit.t6-hydre.name: Hydra
unit.t6-hydre-elite.name: Chthonian Hydra
unit.t7-dragon-ombre.name: Shadow Dragon
unit.t7-dragon-ombre-elite.name: Black Dragon
hero.raelag.name: Raelag
hero.raelag.bio: An overlord exiled from the surface, Raelag forged his power in the depths, uniting the dark elf clans through fear.
hero.raelag.specialty: Shadow Leader — Blood Furies under his command gain attack and defense.
hero.shadya.name: Shadya
hero.shadya.bio: A shadow witch of dreaded talent, Shadya pierced the veils that once bridled destructive magic.
hero.shadya.specialty: Irresistible Veil — her mastery lowers the mana cost of her spells.
unit.t1-eclaireur.lore: You never see us twice. Once is enough.
unit.t1-eclaireur-elite.lore: Light casts shadows. We live in them, and we kill in them.
unit.t2-furie-sanglante.lore: Pain is a prayer. We scream it as we strike.
unit.t2-furie-sanglante-elite.lore: Unchain us, then count your dead. We stopped counting long ago.
unit.t3-minotaure.lore: The labyrinth only loses those who hope to leave it.
unit.t3-minotaure-elite.lore: I guard the gate. None enter. None leave.
unit.t4-chevaucheur-tenebres.lore: We ride what the surface flees. The surface is right to flee.
unit.t4-chevaucheur-tenebres-elite.lore: Hear the gallop in the dark: it is the last sound they will know.
unit.t5-sorciere-ombre.lore: Your wards are wishes. I do not believe in wishes.
unit.t5-sorciere-ombre-elite.lore: I taught magic what it refused to do.
unit.t6-hydre.lore: Sever a head: we have more. You do not.
unit.t6-hydre-elite.lore: What crawls beneath the stone was here before your gods.
unit.t7-dragon-ombre.lore: I drink the light as others breathe. Soon none will remain.
unit.t7-dragon-ombre-elite.lore: No spell touches me, no wall holds me, no dawn follows me.
building.dungeon-cursed-well.lore: The water of the deep does not reflect the sky — it denies it.
